title: gluta nitida
intro: Gluta nitida, also known as the Nyatoh tree, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gluta nitida include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Gluta nitida include extracts and oils that can be used in the form of topical creams, ointments, and salves to promote skin health and well-being.
